problem: Fine-tuning instability: gradient updates can increase loss variance even when mean loss drops; no per-layer monotonicity certificate; existing early-stopping heuristics use validation loss only (global, not layer-local).
sub_problems: P1: Per-layer monotone Lyapunov certificate construction during fine-tuning
form_under_used_check: training-method had 2 uses in E25; not under-used but balanced
